input.command: bash -lc 'OUTDIR="_outputs"; mkdir -p "$OUTDIR"; for id in 101 102 103 104 105 106; do echo "Fetching problem $id"; tvly extract "https://projecteuler.net/problem=$id" -o "$OUTDIR/raw_problem_${id}.md" || exit $?; done; echo "All fetched"'

exit_code=0
